title: Cold-Chain Qubit Routing: Minimum-SWAP QAOA Transpilation
strategies: route-and-undo baseline (restore placement after every interaction)
no-undo greedy in the given order (inherit useful placements)
portfolio over static orders (given / distance-asc / distance-desc) and a dynamic nearest-pair-first order, with move-a / move-b policies
SWAP-count minimisation under a fixed coupling map with exact circuit-equivalence check
